ranking.selection_reason: Lowest model tier and fastest measured wall time among quality-passing exact-shape candidates; quality gap to C04R is below the 10-point materiality threshold.
Best concise exact-shape output and first quality-first shadow.
Comprehensive original matrix pass; retained as higher-confidence fallback.
Passed, but was much slower and token-heavier than medium-effort finalists.

policy_promotion_basis: At least one exact-shape quality-passing candidate exists, and the selected profile is the lowest model tier with acceptable quality.
